prediction.reasoning: The point estimate assumes a slight positive drift (approximately 0.1% from the current price) for LLY, reflecting a general market tendency for growth. Confidence intervals are constructed by modeling 1-day price changes as normally distributed around the point estimate. A daily standard deviation of 1.5% of the current price ($13.70) was used to represent typical daily volatility for LLY. Standard Z-scores (0.6745 for 50%, 1.2816 for 80%, and 1.6449 for 90%) were applied to define the respective confidence levels.
